title: [FIRRTL][ConstantProp] Constant propagation and expansion of muxes
body:
The following case of constant propagation of registers and speculative expansion of optimized muxes is not handled by circt.
The following FIRRTL program
```scala
circuit Top :
  module Top :
    input clock : Clock
    input en : UInt<1>
    output out : UInt<1>
    reg r1 : UInt<1>, clock
    reg r2 : UInt<1>, clock
    when en :
      r1 <= UInt<1>(1)
    r2 <= UInt<1>(0)
    when en :
      r2 <= r2
    out <= xor(r1, r2)
```
`firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces the following verilog
```verilog
module Top(
  input   clock,
  input   en,
  output  out
);
  assign out = 1'h1;
endmodule
```
`firtool` produces the following verilog
```verilog
module Top(
  input  clock, en,
  output out);
  reg r2; // 26.fir:7:5
  `ifndef SYNTHESIS // 26.fir:7:5
    initial begin // 26.fir:7:5
      automatic logic [31:0] _T_1;  // 26.fir:7:5
      `INIT_RANDOM_PROLOG_  // 26.fir:7:5
      `ifdef RANDOMIZE_REG_INIT // 26.fir:7:5
        _T_1 = `RANDOM; // 26.fir:7:5
        r2 = _T_1[0]; // 26.fir:7:5
      `endif
    end // initial
  `endif
  wire _T = r2; // 26.fir:12:10
  wire _T_0 = en & _T;  // 26.fir:12:10
  always @(posedge clock) // 26.fir:12:10
    r2 <= _T_0; // 26.fir:12:10
  assign out = ~_T; // 26.fir:2:10, :13:12
endmodule
```
